scope.club_focus: PSM Makassar / PSM Ujung Pandang / Makassar football association era
scope.competition_focus: PSSI amateur championship / Perserikatan era before Liga Indonesia merger
scope.end_reason: Perserikatan ended/merged with Galatama into Liga Indonesia in 1994/95
scope.important_limit: Pre-1951 PSSI league data was Java-centered; no verified PSM/Makassar match-by-match entries were found for the 1930s-1950 period in the sources used.

coverage_values.context_only: no verified PSM match rows; contextual history only
coverage_values.summary_only: season position/standing known, but PSM match rows not found or not complete
coverage_values.partial: some known PSM matches; not guaranteed complete
coverage_values.available_results: all PSM results visible in the cited source section have been entered
coverage_values.near_complete: season likely close to complete, but source discrepancies or gaps remain

seasons.competition: PSSI inlandsche stedenwedstrijden / colonial-to-early independence context
seasons.team_name_used: MVB/Makassar football association; PSM identity not matched to verified match data

summary.status: No verified PSM/Makassar match-by-match rows found in the sources used.
summary.historical_note: Sources indicate the pre-1951 PSSI competition was Java-centered/restricted, so PSM-era match rows are not included here.

data_gaps: Need local Makassar newspaper archive, PSSI annual reports, or colonial-era football bond records for MVB/PSM match-by-match data.
Do not treat absence of rows as proof PSM/Makassar did not play football; it only means no verified national Perserikatan rows were found in the scraped sources.

summary.top_scorer_note: Andi Ramang recorded as top scorer with 14 goals in the final-stage source.
